---
title: "Slide System Preview"
subtitle: "Locked prototypes before Lecture 01"
format: revealjs
---

## Course Slide System {.type-cover .bg-glow}

![](../_shared/assets/Logo_UCAB_1.png){width="120px"}

Placeholder preview deck\
All slide types are shown with neutral content only.

Giorgio Cunto

## Locked Types {.type-agenda .bg-grid}

- `type-cover`: opening slide
- `type-agenda`: roadmap or outline
- `type-divider`: section break
- `type-message`: one main idea
- `type-content`: standard lecture content
- `type-two-column`: side-by-side explanation
- `type-compare`: contrast or alternatives
- `type-evidence`: metrics or compact evidence
- `type-image`: image, chart, or diagram focus
- `type-quote`: quote or citation slide
- `type-closing`: closing slide

## Section Divider {.type-divider .bg-split}

[Type 03]{.kicker}

Use this slide to start a new section and reset attention.

## Message Slide {.type-message .bg-glow}

This layout is for one sentence that deserves the whole screen.

## Standard Content {.type-content}

::: card
### Placeholder Heading

This is the default explanatory slide. Use it for definitions, short examples, process steps, or narrative teaching content.
:::

## Two Column Slide {.type-two-column}

::::::: columns
:::: {.column width="50%"}
::: card
### Left Block

- Placeholder point one
- Placeholder point two
- Placeholder point three
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="50%"}
::: card
### Right Block

- Placeholder point one
- Placeholder point two
- Placeholder point three
:::
::::
:::::::

## Comparison Slide {.type-compare}

::::: compare-grid
::: card
### Model A

Short placeholder text for the first side of the comparison.
:::

::: card
### Model B

Short placeholder text for the second side of the comparison.
:::
:::::

## Evidence Slide {.type-evidence .bg-grid}

[Type 08]{.kicker}

Use this layout when you want three compact numbers or claims to land quickly.

:::::: metric-grid
::: metric-card
[24%]{.metric-value} Placeholder evidence label
:::

::: metric-card
[3.1x]{.metric-value} Placeholder evidence label
:::

::: metric-card
[12]{.metric-value} Placeholder evidence label
:::
::::::

## Image Focus Slide {.type-image .bg-split}

::: placeholder-box
Placeholder frame for one dominant chart, figure, screenshot, or photo.
:::

## Quote Slide {.type-quote .bg-glow}

> Placeholder quotation or citation block set aside for emphasis.

## Background Rules {.type-content}

::: card
### Locked Background Modifiers

- `.bg-glow`: soft radial emphasis for cover, message, or quote slides
- `.bg-grid`: subtle structure for roadmap or evidence slides
- `.bg-split`: directional band for divider or image-focused slides
:::

## Closing Slide {.type-closing .bg-split}

Slide system preview complete

The next step is choosing which of these types stay, which are removed, and which need variants.
